case_title: AEB JANITORIAL SERVICE VS. DAN MICHAEL et al.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AEB JANITORIAL SERVICE

THE CLAIM OF EXEMPTION SET FOR DEC-03-2012 IS DENIED. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT, CHRIS MEZYNSKI. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY ANDRE BRAND. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DAVID MCDONALD.CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
